## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run format:check`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or examples for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I committed regenerated `dist/` output when source or dependencies changed.
